summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Partial Product Specification feature. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend UI verified: 3 cascading filter columns, 'Ajouter' button at filter level, resolution badges (Catégorie/Modèle/Produit), partial products with amber background and 'À compléter' label, optional Surgeon/Room fields.
passed_tests: POST /api/interventions with category_id only → resolution='category'
POST /api/interventions with category_id+type_id → resolution='type'
POST /api/interventions with product_id → resolution='product'
POST /api/interventions with mixed partial and complete products
PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip_id} refines category to type
PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip_id} refines partial to full product
GET /api/interventions/{id}/fifo-suggestions for category-only products
GET /api/interventions/{id}/fifo-suggestions for full products
GET /api/interventions/{id} enriches with category object
GET /api/interventions/{id} enriches with type_obj
GET /api/interventions/{id} enriches with product and nested objects
Resolution hierarchy: category < type < product verified
Create intervention without surgeon/room (optional fields)
Create intervention with partial products, no surgeon/room
Frontend: 3 cascading filter columns (Catégorie, Modèle, Spécification)
Frontend: 'Ajouter' button at filter level adds partial product
Frontend: Resolution badges show Catégorie (yellow), Modèle (amber), Produit (green)
Frontend: Selected products show resolution badge
Frontend: Detail panel shows partial products with amber background
Frontend: Detail panel shows 'À compléter' label for partial products
Frontend: Edit modal has optional Surgeon/Room fields (placeholder='Facultatif')
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_partial_product_specs.py - Created new test file for partial product specification feature
seed_data_creation: Created test interventions with partial products during testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partial Product Specification feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) InterventionProduct model has optional fields: category_id, type_id, specification_id, instance_id, serial_number. 2) Resolution computed by _enrich_intervention_product: instance > product > specification > type > category. 3) Create form uses /api/instances/available-stock for cascading filters. 4) 'Ajouter' button (data-testid='add-at-filter-level') adds partial products. 5) Detail panel shows partial products with amber background and 'À compléter' label. 6) FIFO suggestions work for partial products by finding matching products by category/type/spec.

POST /api/interventions.partial_products: Supports category_id only, category_id+type_id, or full product_id

GET /api/interventions/{id}.enrichment: Products enriched with category, type_obj, specification_obj, product objects
GET /api/interventions/{id}.resolution: Computed resolution level: instance > product > specification > type > category

PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip.refinement: Can add type_id, specification_id, or product_id to refine partial products
PUT /api/interventions/{id}/products/{ip.auto_fill: Setting product_id auto-fills category_id, type_id, specification_id

GET /api/interventions/{id}/fifo-suggest.partial_support: Finds matching products by category/type/spec for partial products
GET /api/interventions/{id}/fifo-suggest.enrichment: Returns resolution, category, type_obj, specification_obj, product

add_at_filter_level.behavior: Adds partial product with current filter selection
